data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Crew count and subcontractor tracking'. While the linked use case does mention crew counts for different teams, it does not provide evidence of subcontractor tracking, which is a critical part of the requirement. This indicates a gap in the implementation as the evidence does not confirm that subcontractors are being tracked alongside crew counts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add subcontractor tracking evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify subcontractor tracking.
